key.name: first-start
key.summary: Whether the application is launching the first time
key.description: Whether the application is launching the first time

key.name: country-code
key.summary: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format
key.description: Two letter country code of the last available SIM/Network

key.name: send-receipts
key.description: Whether to send the status of the message if read

key.name: message-carbons
key.description: Share chat history among devices

key.name: mam-enabled
key.description: Enable MAM archive synchronization from the server

key.name: purple-enabled
key.description: Enable purple accounts

key.name: send-typing
key.description: Whether to Send typing notifications

key.name: strip-url-tracking-id
key.description: Whether to Remove Tracking IDs from URLs Automatically

key.name: strip-url-tracking-id-dialog
key.summary: Whether Strip Tracking IDs was shown
key.description: Whether the Tracking IDs dialog has been shown

key.name: render-attachments
key.description: Whether to Render Attachments or not

key.name: blur-idle-buddies
key.description: Mark Idle users differently

key.name: indicate-unknown-contacts
key.description: Indicate unknown contacts

key.name: convert-emoticons
key.description: Convert text matching emoticons as real emoticons

key.name: return-sends-message
key.description: Whether pressing Enter key sends the message

key.name: request-sms-delivery-reports
key.description: Whether to request delivery reports for outgoing SMS

key.name: clear-out-stuck-sms
key.description: Whether Chatty should clear out SMS that are stuck in receiving/unknown state

key.name: experimental-features
key.description: Whether to enable experimental features

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Window maximized state

key.name: window-size
key.description: Window size (width, height).

key.name: user-id
key.description: The user ID for PGP that Chatty will use for outgoing messages

key.name: public-key-fingerprint
key.description: The default keyid the remote side should use to encrypt messages to us
